{"type":"text","timestamp":1781623952407,"sessionID":"ses_12efdbaf7ffeMOn0AGhWKKNDvW","part":{"id":"prt_ed10fe15d001pDv4WQqA8GKJeg","messageID":"msg_ed10fcdf3001lKWLkuxiYnAY7J","sessionID":"ses_12efdbaf7ffeMOn0AGhWKKNDvW","type":"text","text":"All deliverables are complete. Here's the summary:

## Phase 1 â€” Delivered

### Project structure
```
.
â”śâ”€â”€ data/movements.csv       # CSV copied from DATASET_PATH
â”śâ”€â”€ src/it_assets/
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ __init__.py          # Public API
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ cli.py               # Click console script -> `it-assets`
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ config.py            # python-dotenv loader (auto-finds .env)
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ dashboard.py         # Streamlit UI
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ data.py              # Pure analytics (loaded as `it_assets.data`)
â”śâ”€â”€ tests/                   # 40 tests, conftest + 3 modules
â”śâ”€â”€ .env                     # Versioned with real values (DATASET_PATH, JWT_SECRET, ADMIN/VIEWER creds, etc.)
â”śâ”€â”€ pyproject.toml           # Python 3.12, hatchling, ruff line-length=100, pytest --cov
â”śâ”€â”€ README.md
â””â”€â”€ .gitignore
```

### Single-command run (Phase 1 contract)
```
uvx --from . it-assets serve
```
Verified: starts Streamlit on `127.0.0.1:8501`, responds with `HTTP 200`. Also accepts `--host` and `--port`. `uv run it-assets serve` and `it-assets info` / `it-assets import` also work.

### Tests + coverage
```
40 passed in 0.91s
TOTAL coverage: 87% (data.py 97%, __init__ 100%, cli.py 80%, config.py 73%)
```

### Lint
```
ruff check . -> All checks passed!
```
Configured with `line-length = 100`, plus rules `E F W I B UP N SIM`.

### Dashboard features
- KPI cards: total movements, unique assets/employees/locations, in_use/available/in_repair counts, current allocated value (BRL).
- Charts: monthly movements bar, action donut, asset-type bar, destination-location bar.
- Tables: current asset state (latest movement per asset), available assets, top employees.
- Asset lifecycle explorer.
- Sidebar filters: type, action, status, location, date range.
- Data-quality fix: source CSV has rows where `asset_type` was overwritten with the action name; `_repair_asset_type` back-fills the canonical type.

### Phase 2/3 readiness
- `.env` already contains `JWT_SECRET`, `ADMIN_USER`/`ADMIN_PASSWORD`, `VIEWER_USER`/`VIEWER_PASSWORD`, `DB_PATH`.
- `Settings` exposes all of those plus `project_root`, ready to be consumed by FastAPI/SQLite/JWT/RBAC.
- The `it-assets` console script is a Click group, so adding new subcommands (e.g., `serve` becomes API+Web, plus `migrate`, etc.) is a one-line change.","time":{"start":1781623939421,"end":1781623952404}}}

{"type":"text","timestamp":1781625309132,"sessionID":"ses_12efdbaf7ffeMOn0AGhWKKNDvW","part":{"id":"prt_ed124877d001n6KW0iJ75ivjTq","messageID":"msg_ed12463d400135PdaN7CcjEMKR","sessionID":"ses_12efdbaf7ffeMOn0AGhWKKNDvW","type":"text","text":"## Phase 2 â€” Delivered

The Streamlit dashboard has been refactored into a complete **FastAPI + SQLite + Jinja2 + JWT + RBAC** application, **reusing** the analytics layer from Phase 1 (`it_assets.data`) and reorganized into clear layers.

### Single-command run

```
uvx --from . it-assets serve
# or with overrides:
uvx --from . it-assets serve --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
```

The lifespan hook auto-creates SQLite tables, seeds users from `.env`, and ingests the CSV from `DATASET_PATH` (idempotent).

### Layered architecture

```
src/it_assets/
â”śâ”€â”€ cli.py                  # serve / import / info
â”śâ”€â”€ config.py               # python-dotenv settings
â”śâ”€â”€ data.py                 # REUSED: KPI / breakdown analytics
â”śâ”€â”€ main.py                 # FastAPI factory + module-level `app`
â”śâ”€â”€ schemas.py              # Pydantic models
â”śâ”€â”€ security.py             # bcrypt + JWT
â”śâ”€â”€ api/
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ deps.py             # DB session, current_user, require_admin
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ routers/auth.py, assets.py, movements.py, dashboard.py
â”śâ”€â”€ db/
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ base.py             # SQLAlchemy 2.x engine/session/Base
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ models.py           # User, Asset, Movement
â”śâ”€â”€ services/
â”‚   â”śâ”€â”€ users.py, assets.py, movements.py, ingestion.py, dashboard.py
â””â”€â”€ web/
    â”śâ”€â”€ routes.py           # /, /login, /dashboard, /assets, /movements
    â””â”€â”€ templates/          # base.html, login.html, dashboard.html, ...
```

### Contract checks (verified end-to-end via curl)

- `POST /auth/login` `{username,password}` â†’ **200** `{token,...}` for valid; **401** for invalid
- `GET /api/assets` without token â†’ **401**
- `GET /api/assets` with viewer token â†’ **200**
- `POST /api/assets` with viewer token â†’ **403** (RBAC denial)
- `POST /api/assets` with admin token â†’ **201** (CRUD persisted)
- `GET /` returns HTML with `<form>` containing `username` & `password` fields
- `GET /healthz` returns `{"status":"ok","version":"0.2.0"}`

### Quality

```
ruff check .            All checks passed!
pytest                  86 passed in 26.92s
coverage                89% total (data 97%, security 100%, schemas 100%, auth router 100%, dashboard 92-100%)
```

### Test breakdown (86 tests, 8 modules)

- `test_security.py` (7) â€” bcrypt + JWT encode/decode/expired
- `test_data.py` (31) â€” analytics functions
- `test_config.py` (6) â€” env parsing
- `test_ingestion.py` (5) â€” CSV â†’ SQLite
- `test_cli.py` (6) â€” `it-assets info` / `import` (with and without `--no-copy`/`--no-load-db`)
- `test_api.py` (19) â€” login, JWT, RBAC denial (403), full admin CRUD lifecycle, persistence
- `test_web.py` (10) â€” login form, session cookie, redirects, page rendering
- `test_data.py` analytics integration

### .env (versioned, real values)

`JWT_SECRET`, `JWT_ALGORITHM`, `JWT_EXPIRES_MINUTES`, `ADMIN_USER`/`ADMIN_PASSWORD`, `VIEWER_USER`/`VIEWER_PASSWORD`, `API_HOST`/`API_PORT`, `DATASET_PATH`, `DB_PATH` â€” all populated with real defaults so the harness can run the app without supplying anything.","time":{"start":1781625292669,"end":1781625309128}}}
